name: John "Soap" MacTavish
description:
Forest, trap, and Johhny.

Background:

It was the moment the so-called negotiators pulled out their guns and pointed them at the operatives that made them the enemy for them. It was supposed to be peaceful negotiations without weapons and other shit. It was at that moment that they realised they had no time for a shootout.

"Scatter!"

Price barked, and at that moment everyone ran in different directions, hiding in the dense forest because of the trees, fir trees and other greenery and shit...

Good luck :)
creator: Kemish_Teufel
